name: enterprise-cicd-governance
description: Enterprise CI/CD Governance MCP Server - AI-powered PR analysis, security scanning, and deployment decisions using GitHub Copilot SDK
author: Enterprise DevOps Team

governance.description: Enterprise CI/CD Governance Server providing AI-powered governance tools

tools.name: analyze_pull_request
tools.description: Analyze a GitHub pull request for governance decisions. Returns risk assessment, policy compliance, and recommended actions based on file changes, approvals, and enterprise policies.

tools.name: check_security_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Check for security vulnerabilities using npm audit and GitHub security features. Returns vulnerability counts, risk levels, and recommendations.

tools.name: evaluate_deployment_readiness
tools.description: Evaluate if a deployment is ready to proceed. Checks CI status, required approvals, and generates environment-specific checklists.

tools.name: get_infrastructure_changes
tools.description: Detect infrastructure-as-code changes (Terraform, Bicep, YAML) between branches. Identifies production vs non-production changes.

tools.name: generate_governance_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive Markdown governance report for a PR or repository, suitable for posting as a PR comment.

tools.name: check_policy_compliance
tools.description: Validate changes against enterprise governance policies. Returns required approvals, security review requirements, and compliance status.

prompts.name: governance_analysis
prompts.description: Analyze a PR or deployment for governance compliance
prompts.template: Analyze PR #{{prNumber}} in {{owner}}/{{repo}} for governance compliance. Consider security risks, infrastructure changes, and policy requirements.

prompts.name: deployment_decision
prompts.description: Make a deployment decision for an environment
prompts.template: Evaluate deployment to {{environment}} for {{owner}}/{{repo}}. Should this deployment proceed? What checks are required?

prompts.name: security_review
prompts.description: Perform a security review of the repository
prompts.template: Perform a security review of {{owner}}/{{repo}}. Check for vulnerabilities, security misconfigurations, and provide recommendations.

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub Personal Access Token with repo scope
